name: Ashen Grip
location: Beacon Falls in Auridon, Par Molag in Glenumbra, Magmaflow Overlook in Stonefalls

bonuses.stat: When you deal Martial melee damage, you breathe fire to all enemies in front of you for 774 Flame Damage. This effect can occur once every 4 seconds and scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
